update.description: Force-delete a stuck compute environment, bypassing active-job checks. Only valid for environments in ERRORED, INVALID, or DELETING status.
update.name: force

update.description: When true, narrow the catalog to Scheduler-compatible instance types (AWS only).
update.name: sched

update.description: When true, narrow the catalog to NVMe-equipped instance types (AWS only).
update.name: nvme
